_readme: Claude Code project-local settings. Copy to .claude/settings.local.json and replace <repo-path> with the absolute path to this repo on your machine. This file is a sanitized reference — the real settings.local.json is gitignored.

SessionStart._why: Injects current branch and last 5 commits into Claude context at session start — no manual briefing needed.

PreToolUse._why: Runs validate-repo.sh before every git commit. Blocks the commit if validation fails. Enforces the same checks CI runs on push.

hooks.command: cd <repo-path> && ./scripts/validate-repo.sh 2>&1 && echo '{}' || printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "validate-repo.sh fehlgeschlagen — alle Fehler beheben vor dem Commit"}'

Stop._why: Mandatory devops-til update reminder at session end. Per CLAUDE.md: new concepts learned in a session must be documented in ~/git/devops-til/.

hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY: Per CLAUDE.md, before ending this session check what was learned and update ~/git/devops-til/. New concepts go in new .md files (linux/, ansible/, proxmox/ etc.), update README.md index, then: git -C ~/git/devops-til push origin main"}}'
